title: Prehistoric Mobs
description: Adds the Big Beak (a large ride-able bird), and the Hungry Dripleaf (a carnivorous plant).
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wrmx90yJxjs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> **Note:**
>
> If installing as a datapack, make sure to download the *Required Resource Pack* from the *Versions* tab.

## Big Beak

In trail ruins, you can find a Big Beak egg. 

The egg will hatch in 5 minutes, or 2.5m if placed next to other eggs.

Tame the big beak to ride it. It will slowly glide to ground, and can maneuver in-air.

> You can summon a Big Beak with the command:
> ```mcfunction
> /function prehistoric_mobs:summon/big_beak
> ```

![A player riding a Big Beak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd8703ecc2a1cd0b0d1459bd6acfbab249352fc9.jpeg)

## Hungry Dripleaf

Sniffers can find this plant in lush caves.

The hungry dripleaf is a prehistoric variant of the big dripleaf. It will poison any mob standing on it. Sneak to avoid its attack.

If the mob dies, the dripleaf will grow.

> You can give yourself a Hungry Dripleaf with the command:
> ```mcfunction
> /function prehistoric_mobs:hungry_dripleaf/give
> ```

![A player jumping into a Hungry Dripleaf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc6fbc8668d043f4a6fae2856d9b8a8f5b40d239.jpeg)
